package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_logging_overhead_log_payload_serialized_before_sampling: Layer: Logging overhead. Flag payload serialization for logs before sampling or level filters run.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule561PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario561Positive(records []Rule561PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
